title: Access Control Policy
description: The organization develops, documents, and disseminates an access control policy and reviews it at defined intervals.

title: Multi-Factor Authentication
description: The system enforces multi-factor authentication for all privileged and remote access sessions.

title: Audit Logging
description: The system generates audit records for defined events including access, modifications, and security-relevant actions.

title: Audit Log Retention
description: Audit logs are retained for a minimum defined period and protected against unauthorized modification or deletion.

title: Boundary Protection
description: The system monitors and controls communications at external and key internal boundaries using managed interfaces.

title: Transmission Confidentiality
description: The system protects the confidentiality of transmitted information using cryptographic mechanisms.

title: Configuration Management
description: The organization establishes and maintains baseline configurations and inventories of information systems.

title: Vulnerability Scanning
description: The organization scans for vulnerabilities at defined frequencies and remediates findings within defined timelines.

title: Identification and Authentication
description: The system uniquely identifies and authenticates organizational users and processes acting on behalf of users.

title: Continuous Monitoring
description: The organization implements a continuous monitoring strategy including ongoing assessment of security controls.
